task_summary: Port 4 decomposition persistence fixes from implement-feature to fix-ticket and fix-bugs, document subtask schema fields, bump to v6.1.9
constraints: Changes must be exact ports from implement-feature SKILL.md patterns
Preserve existing step numbering in target skills

fix-ticket step 4b has state.json write for AUTO→SINGLE_PASS fallthrough
fix-ticket step 4c has mkdir -p .claude/decomposition/ before YAML write

skip_rationale: Mechanical port of 4 explicit fixes from reference implementation. Zero ambiguity, zero design decisions. All target files and exact changes specified in roadmap.

destructive_ops.evidence: Pure markdown file edits, no file deletion or data destruction

credential_handling.evidence: No credentials, secrets, or API keys involved in markdown edits

irreversible_side_effects.evidence: No emails, notifications, deployments, or external API calls

elevated_privileges.evidence: No sudo, chmod, chown, or privilege escalation in markdown edits

ambiguous_scope.evidence: Scope explicitly bounded to 7 named files with specific changes

network_irreversibility.evidence: No DNS, CDN, webhook, or network configuration changes

supply_chain_ops.evidence: No package publishing, only internal version bump in metadata

billing_quota_ops.evidence: No cloud provisioning, quota changes, or billing modifications

system_service_effects.evidence: No systemctl, cron, docker daemon, or firewall changes
